title: Exchange of Letters agreeing that, in relation to the United Kingdom, the Agreement for the Exchange of Postal Parcels of 6 July and 20 August 1920 ceased to apply to the Channel Islands with effect from l October 1969 and to the Isle of Man with effect from 5 July 1973 [NIR. 5 LNTS 130 and 113 BSP 329]
subject: POSTAL
